title: Add HD realistic image for About page

requirements.text: Generate a high-definition (1920x1080) realistic image suitable for the About Us page hero section

quotes: Make image more for about page. It should be in HD and should like real.

acceptanceCriteria: Image is generated in HD resolution (1920x1080 pixels)
Image has a realistic photographic quality appropriate for a healthcare technology company's About page
Image is saved in the frontend/public/assets/generated directory

requirements.text: Integrate the generated HD image into the About Us page hero section, replacing or enhancing the current visual presentation
acceptanceCriteria: The generated image is displayed in the About Us page hero section
Image maintains responsive behavior across different screen sizes
Visual presentation is cohesive with the existing Royal Teal theme and company branding

constraints: Do not change existing frontend routing or navigation structure
Preserve the existing About Us page content and layout structure
nonGoals: Modifying other pages beyond the About Us page
Changing the color scheme or branding guidelines
Adding new sections or content to the About Us page

required: Professional healthcare technology office environment with modern team collaboration, natural lighting, diverse professionals working with medical technology and data analytics displays (about-hero.dim_1920x1080.png)
